product_details_tab_data.Title: Jimmy Choo Fever Eau de Parfum, 60 ml
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Fragrances › Women › Eau de Parfum
product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Hold the fragrance 5 inches away and spray your skin, focusing on pulse points (neck and wrists).
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: This fragrance is perfect for a night out. It will make you feel confident, glamourous and seductive.
